cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the problem is about Jane's birthday and calculating a date a month ago from today. Let me break it down step by step. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Since February usually has 28 days, but in a leap year, it has 29. So I need to check if 2001 is a leap year. Leap years are divisible by 4, but if they're divisible by 100, they must also be divisible by 400. 2001 divided by 4 is 500.25, which isn't a whole number, so 2001 is not a leap year. Therefore, the last day of February 2001 is February 28, 2001. So Jane's birthday is 02/28/2001. Now, today is her 16th birthday. That would
